commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Keep therefore and do them; for this is your wisdom and your understanding in the sight of the nations, which shall hear all these statutes, and say, Surely this great nation is a wise and understanding people. This is a proof of your wisdom, if you observe these commands. Your conduct will excite the admiration of all. (Menochius) Solomon often inculcates the same truths, Proverbs i. , and Ecclesiasticus i. Even profane writers applauded the laws and fidelity of the Jews. See Josephus, Jewish Wars i. ; Strabo xvi.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
